title: rubus perdurus
intro: Rubus perdurus, also known as the bramble or European dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rubus perdurus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Rubus perdurus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for herbal use, and it is also sometimes used topically as a compress or poultice to treat skin conditions.
